user.title: Engelsoft Beacon BACnet/IP
user.description: Enter the host and port of your Bepacom Gateway.

init.title: Engelsoft Beacon BACnet/IP options
init.description: General base settings. Object management, overrides, subscribe/polling, explorer and bulk edit are handled in the “Engelsoft Beacon BACnet/IP” sidebar.

general.title: General settings
general.description: Only global base options remain here. BACnet objects, subscribe/polling and overrides are managed exclusively in the “Engelsoft Beacon BACnet/IP” sidebar.
